description: The 'Ndrina De Stefano is a powerful 'ndrina of the 'Ndrangheta based in Reggio Calabria, Italy, historically considered the most influential in the city. Founded by Domenico Tripodo, it later came under the leadership of Paolo De Stefano. The clan was involved in the first and second 'Ndrangheta wars and has expanded its operations to northern Italy and abroad, engaging in drug trafficking and other illegal activities.
